CREATE TABLE test_table (number Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY number;
SELECT quantilesGK(5, 0.1, 0.5, 0.9)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_table WHERE number > 5);
SELECT quantilesGK(1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(number + 1) AS quantiles FROM (SELECT number FROM test_table) GROUP BY number;
SELECT quantilesGK(10, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(number) OVER (PARTITION BY (number % 2)) FROM test_table;
SELECT toFloat64(quantilesGK(10, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(number)) FROM (SELECT sum(number) as number FROM test_table GROUP BY number);
SELECT quantilesGK(2, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_table WHERE number BETWEEN 1 AND 10) WHERE number > 3;
CREATE TABLE additional_table (number Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY number;
SELECT quantilesGK(5, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75)((SELECT avg(number) FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT avg(number) FROM additional_table));
CREATE TABLE complex_table AS SELECT number, number * 2 AS doubled FROM test_table;
